as the contract ID in the 
reference year (2024). 
This field is a key that links the plan sponsor’s contract and plan identifiers. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
Five-digit alpha/numeric value 
COMMENT: 
To determine whether the contract and plan IDs in the data file for the reference year (year of 
the data file) represent the same plan in the prior year, compare this variable (along with the 
corresponding PLAN_ID_23) to the CONTRACT_ID_24 (and PLAN_ID_24).
